---
title: ""
---

::: {.content-visible}
<div style="height: 3cm;"></div>
:::

# Art Gallery

All works here are made by yours truly! Those made digitally are done in Adobe Fresco, a personal preference of mine despite having access to Adobe Photoshop through my university. Simpler is better! I tend to use one brush (the pencil brush) and few layers. Old habits die hard coming from traditional art. Other mediums I use include acrylic painting, oil pastels, mixed materials, Minecraft (it counts!), and pencil. As you enjoy your scrolling, each image is able to be clicked on for a better zoom.

If you have any questions about my art, would like to send a comment, or are wondering about commissions, reach me at [my email](mailto::auritrayne@gmail.com).

Other art socials:

- [Art Fight](https://artfight.net/~rainbowshadow2)
- [Future Home of the Minecraft World Download]()

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Shade: November, 2025](posts/shade/Scribbles.jpg){.lightbox}

![Frog Collage: April, 2025](posts/frog-collage/Frog.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

![All the World's a Stage: May, 2025](posts/all-the-worlds-a-stage/AllTheWorldsAStage.jpg){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Vanreno: April, 2024](posts/laurus/laurus.jpg){.lightbox}

![Annabella: March, 2026](posts/annabella/annabella.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

![Knox: April, 2024](posts/knox-drawn/knoxDrawn.png){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Valley: May, 2026](posts/rocky-pasture/Landscape.jpg){.lightbox}

![Zulius and the Northern Lights: May, 2026](posts/zulius-lights/ZuliusLights.png){.lightbox}
:::

![Sunset Collage: January, 2026](posts/sunset-collage/sunset.jpg){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Sunflower: June, 2026](posts/sunflower-tote/sunflower.jpg){.lightbox}

![Craig: July, 2024](posts/craig/craig.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

![Mt. Velgrin: September, 2020](posts/mt-velgrin-trad/mtVelgrin.jpg){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Trombone: September, 2024](posts/trombone/trombone.jpg){.lightbox}

![Husker Shako: September, 2024](posts/marching-band/shako.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

![Forest: January, 2025](posts/forest/forest.png){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Mt. Velgrin: May, 2026](posts/mt-velgrin/mtVelgrin.jpg){.lightbox}

![Heart of Ardonia: May, 2026](posts/heart-of-ardonia/heartOfArdonia.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

![Drift Stormguard: June, 2024](posts/drift/drift.jpg){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Joanna Clark: February, 2024](posts/joanna-clark/joannaClark.jpg){.lightbox}

![Self Portrait: February, 2024](posts/portrait/selfPortrait.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

# Minecraft Builds and Blender

![Knox, Minecraft: June, 2026](posts/knox/knoxCastle.png){.lightbox}

![Knox, Minecraft: June, 2026](posts/knox/knoxWindmill.png){.lightbox}

![Knox, Minecraft: June, 2026](posts/knox/knoxValley.png){.lightbox}

![Knox, Blender Minecraft: May, 2026](posts/blender-basics/KnoxOutskirts.png){.lightbox}

![Knox, Blender Minecraft: May, 2026](posts/blender-basics/ArenaRender2.png){.lightbox}


# Photography
![Capital Firefighter: February, 2026](posts/firefighter/FirefighterLadder.png){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Baltimore Renaissance: October, 2025](posts/baltimore-sunset/BaltimoreRenaissance.jpg){.lightbox}

![Driftwood Beach: June, 2025](posts/driftwood-beach/DriftwoodBeach.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

![Vegas: December, 2025](posts/vegas/vegas.jpg){.lightbox}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![MacLean Hall: June, 2026](posts/maclean/maclean.jpg){.lightbox}

![Praying Mantis: June, 2026](posts/praying-mantis/prayingMantis.jpg){.lightbox}
:::

![Disney World, Tangled: July, 2024](posts/tangled-sunset/tangled.jpg)

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Save Our Stats: October, 2025](posts/saveourstats/saveourstats.jpg){.lightbox}

![Husker Sunrise: September, 2024](posts/husker-sunrise/huskerStadium.jpg){.lightbox}
:::
